description: Pin-based annotation overlay for design review — wraps any content and adds interactive comment pins with pluggable persistence

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL to JSON file containing pin data

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Enables annotate mode toolbar and pin creation

attributes.name: author
attributes.description: Default author name for new pins

events.name: review-surface:add
events.description: Fired when a pin is created

events.name: review-surface:update
events.description: Fired when a pin is modified

events.name: review-surface:remove
events.description: Fired when a pin is deleted

events.name: review-surface:resolve
events.description: Fired when a pin is marked resolved

events.name: review-surface:select
events.description: Fired when a pin popover is opened
